rawAssistant: Mira's expression turns serious as she considers your question. When traveling to new places, especially at night or on unfamiliar roads, it's wise to ensure you have a clear path ahead and can navigate safely in the dark. Before leaving, make sure to check that all lanterns are secure and not damaged from last night's gale.
